description: One line item is malformed (amount is prose, not a number) — a real failure mode when an LLM fills the tool call. The good items must still extract; the bad one is skipped rather than failing the whole quote. Pins the try/except in _line_items_from_params.

simulated_conversation.message: Two bedroom local move, Rock Hill to Charlotte. What's your price?
Sixteen hundred base. Fuel's one fifty. Insurance depends on declared value, varies.
So seventeen fifty plus whatever insurance comes to. Binding on the seventeen fifty?

tool_calls.params_as_json: {"outcome": "quote_given", "company_name": "Catawba Moving Co", "base_price": 1600, "line_items": [{"label": "Base move", "amount": 1600, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Fuel", "amount": 150, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Insurance", "amount": "varies by declared value", "is_optional_or_conditional": true}], "total_price": 1750, "binding": true}
